summary: Phase 2 Sponsorship Marketplace + Image Compression end-to-end UI + backend regression (iteration 18). All 10 scenarios from the review request PASS. Anonymous /sponsorships page renders the filter bar (mkt-price + mkt-search), 'Sign up as a sponsor' banner, and the seeded mkt-card-0a27a726-... with the Sponsorship-ready badge. Price filter ≤₹50,000 AND ≤₹10,000 both still return the event (Boundary ₹10K matches). Homepage footer 'Become a sponsor' link navigates to /sponsor/signup. Signup form (sponsor-signup-company/contact/email/password/submit testids) registers a new QA sponsor and redirects to /sponsors/me with the sponsor profile editor (company name 'QA SPONSOR' rendered). Express-interest flow: clicking opp-interest-opp2 opens interest-dialog, submitting via interest-submit triggers a success toast and after reload the Boundary opp shows 'INTEREST SENT · PENDING' tag with the interest button removed (duplicate-block confirmed — opp-interest-opp2 count=0 post-submit). Logging out and back in as mkt-organiser@test.com / test123, navigating to the same event's Sponsorship tab shows the INTEREST QUEUE panel with the QA Sponsor row and an interest-accept-{id} button — clicking it (window.confirm auto-accepted) empties the queue. Anonymous reload of the public listing now displays 'BOUNDARY · AVAILABLE · 4 SLOTS · ✦ Sponsored by QA Sponsor' (the awarded_to entry rendered correctly, opp2 slots_remaining=4 confirmed via backend marketplace endpoint). Admin metrics: logging in as admin@kreedanation.com on /platform-admin Dashboard tab, sponsorship-metrics-card shows: Total opportunities=6, Total value=₹250,000, Pending=0, Awarded=2, Rejected=0, Top Sponsors lists BOTH 'Marketplace Sponsor ₹200,000 · 1' and 'QA Sponsor ₹10,000 · 1', Top Events lists 'Marketplace Test League ₹250,000'. Backend GET /api/admin/sponsorship-metrics returns identical payload. Image compression: on /sponsors/me logo upload, set_input_files on [data-testid$="-file"] triggered the pipeline and a sonner toast 'Image uploaded · 1 KB' appeared (visible top-right) confirming compressImage ran and the size string was rendered.
critical_code_review_comments: ImageUpload.jsx uses one shared `busy` flag — if a user double-clicks the file input while the previous upload is still going, the second pick is queued but the toast wording does not indicate which target finished (no per-instance label). Minor UX; not a bug.

SponsorshipMetricsCard shows Pending/Awarded/Rejected as bare numbers — the review brief expected Pending/Awarded/Rejected to all be > 0 but in this test flow Rejected=0 (no reject path was exercised). This is not a defect, just reflects current data state. Consider adding a tooltip when a counter is 0 so admins know the metric is wired (currently zero looks identical to missing).

EventSponsorshipManager's SponsorBrowseView renders the 'Sponsored by …' line as a single comma-joined string from awarded_to[]. If 5 slots all sell out, the line could grow very wide on mobile — consider truncation/expand-on-hover at >2 sponsors.
compressImage.js skips SVG/GIF by mimetype — perfect — but if a backend converts uploaded PNGs to AVIF for storage there is no further size check after upload. Out-of-scope but worth noting.

Footer 'Become a sponsor' link is anchor-only — no aria-label or distinguishing visual for screen readers between 'Become a sponsor' and 'Become an organiser' / 'Become a vendor' which all live in adjacent JOIN column. Adds no functional bug.

success_rate.backend: 100% — GET /sponsorships/marketplace (price_max=50000 + price_max=10000), POST /sponsorships/interests (via UI), GET /events/{id}/sponsorships/interests, PATCH /sponsorships/interests/{id} (accept), GET /admin/sponsorship-metrics, POST /sponsor/signup, POST /auth/login (admin + organiser + sponsor) all returned 2xx with correct payloads. Boundary opp2: sold_count=1, slots_remaining=4, awarded_to=[{name:'QA Sponsor', …}] confirmed via marketplace endpoint.
success_rate.frontend: 100% — 10/10 review scenarios passed (anon browse, two price filters, footer link, sponsor signup, interest dialog+submit+pending tag, duplicate block, organiser accept, public sold-out banner with 4 slots remaining, admin metrics card with both top sponsors listed, image-compression toast with KB string).

test_credentials: Created during this run: qa-p2-1782044957@test.com / sponsor123 (sponsor 'QA Sponsor'). Pre-existing creds used: admin@kreedanation.com / admin123, mkt-organiser@test.com / test123. Sponsor signup auto-redirects to /sponsors/me. Sponsor logs in via the unified /login page (button text 'Sign in', testid 'login-submit' or button[type=submit]).
seed_data_creation: No mongo seed needed — the seeded 'Marketplace Test League' event (id 0a27a726-02e9-4aaf-a2aa-8518279e8e2f) and organiser were already present. New QA Sponsor user + sponsor_profile + one accepted sponsorship_interest were created via the UI flow during the test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 marketplace + accept flow is GREEN. Key learnings for future runs: (a) The unified /login form uses data-testid 'login-submit' (or button[type=submit]); the visible button label is 'Sign in' with lowercase i. (b) Sponsor signup testids: sponsor-signup-company / -contact / -email / -password / -submit; placeholders only (no name attrs). (c) After organiser accepts, the 'Sponsored by …' banner is NOT visible on the organiser-authenticated view of the event Sponsorship tab — it appears only on the anonymous/public view of /events/{id} → Sponsorship tab (because EventSponsorshipManager swaps in OrganiserInterestQueue for the organiser). Test from anonymous context to verify the banner. (d) ImageUpload's hidden file input is selectable via '[data-testid$="-file"]' and triggering set_input_files directly fires onChange → onPick → compressImage → toast 'Image uploaded · {kb} KB'. Sonner toasts auto-dismiss in ~4s so poll the DOM rapidly. (e) opp1 Title Sponsor is already SOLD by 'Marketplace Sponsor' as expected baseline; opp2 Boundary is the one to interact with. (f) The admin sponsorship-metrics-card uses Total/Pending/Awarded/Rejected counters — in this test Pending and Rejected ended at 0 because every interest was accepted; that's expected, not a bug.
rca of the issue: n/a — no defects found. Two test-script-only stumbles during execution that are NOT product bugs: (1) on the very first /sponsor/signup attempt I targeted inputs by placeholder regex instead of data-testid and one field didn't get filled, causing the signup to silently no-op (the form does not surface a visible error toast for empty required fields — minor UX nit logged under code-review comments). Re-running with the exact data-testids worked first try. (2) admin /login attempt used button name='Sign In' (capital I) which didn't match the actual label 'Sign in'; switching to button[type=submit]/[data-testid=login-submit] worked. Both flows were product-functional throughout.
